_comment: Copy this file to 'ebay.config.json' and fill in your eBay keys. See EBAY_SETUP.md. Never share ebay.config.json - it contains your secret.
_redirectUri_comment: Only needed for Phase 2 (real publishing): your RuName from the eBay developer portal (User tokens (OAuth) -> Get a Token -> RuName). Leave as-is if you only want live appraisals.
